entityKinds.name: Behavior
entityKinds.description: A testable unit of system functionality with a defined contract

fields.name: contract
fields.description: The behavioral contract this behavior guarantees

fields.name: invariants
fields.description: Invariants this behavior enforces

fields.name: types
fields.description: Type definitions used by this behavior

fields.name: ports
fields.description: Port interfaces this behavior interacts with

fields.name: produces
fields.description: Events produced as a result of this behavior

fields.name: consumes
fields.description: Events this behavior reacts to

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification tag for agent task routing

fields.name: tests
fields.description: File paths to test files that verify this behavior

fields.name: gherkin
fields.description: File paths to Gherkin feature files for BDD scenarios

fields.name: features
fields.description: Product features this behavior implements

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this behavior

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status of this behavior

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references such as issue or document URIs

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Impact level if this behavior fails

fields.name: diagnostic
fields.description: Diagnostic message for validation tooling

entityKinds.name: Invariant
entityKinds.description: A system-wide constraint that must always hold true

fields.name: guarantee
fields.description: The constraint this invariant guarantees holds at all times

fields.name: risk
fields.description: Consequence or impact if this invariant is violated

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this invariant

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references such as issue or document URIs

entityKinds.name: Event
entityKinds.description: A significant occurrence in the system that triggers reactions

fields.name: channel
fields.description: Communication channel this event is published on

fields.name: channel_type
fields.description: Transport mechanism for the channel (e.g. queue, topic, stream)

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification of this event (e.g. domain, integration, system)

fields.name: payload
fields.description: Type definition describing this event's data shape

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this event

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references such as issue or document URIs

fields.name: contract
fields.description: Delivery or ordering guarantees for this event

entityKinds.name: Type
entityKinds.description: A data structure or domain model definition

fields.name: kind
fields.description: The type category (e.g. struct, enum, alias, opaque)

fields.name: fields
fields.description: Structured field definitions for this type

fields.name: composed_types
fields.description: Types composed or referenced by this type

fields.name: extends
fields.description: Parent type this type extends or inherits from

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this type

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references such as issue or document URIs

entityKinds.name: Port
entityKinds.description: An interface boundary between system components

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Whether this port is inbound, outbound, or bidirectional

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification of this port (e.g. http, grpc, database, queue)

fields.name: methods
fields.description: Method signatures exposed by this port interface

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this port

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references such as issue or document URIs

edgeTypes.label: BehaviorImplementsFeature
edgeTypes.description: Behavior implements a feature (cross-extension via peer_dependency @specforge/product)

edgeTypes.label: BehaviorReferencesType
edgeTypes.description: Behavior references a type definition in its contract

edgeTypes.label: EventCarriesPayloadType
edgeTypes.description: Event carries this type as its payload data shape

edgeTypes.label: TypeComposesType
edgeTypes.description: Type composes or references another type definition

edgeTypes.label: TypeExtendsType
edgeTypes.description: Type extends or composes another type

edgeTypes.label: TestedBy
edgeTypes.description: Entity is tested by an external test file (from tests field with file_reference=true)

edgeTypes.label: ExternalRef
edgeTypes.description: Entity references an external URI or resource

edgeTypes.label: MilestoneIncludesBehavior
edgeTypes.description: Milestone delivers a behavior (cross-extension enhancement edge)

fields.name: ports
fields.description: Port interfaces this module consumes

fields.name: ports_defined
fields.description: Port interfaces this module defines

fields.name: behaviors
fields.description: Behaviors this milestone includes in its delivery scope

validationRules.messageTemplate: behavior '{id}' does not implement any feature
type '{id}' is not referenced by any behavior, port, or type
invariant '{id}' is not enforced by any behavior
{kind} '{id}' is testable but has no verify or test reference
{kind} '{id}' is testable but has no verify or test reference
{kind} '{id}' is testable but has no verify or test reference
{kind} '{id}' is testable but has no verify or test reference
{kind} '{id}' is testable but has no verify or test reference
port '{id}' is not referenced by any behavior
behavior '{id}' has no category — agents use category for task routing
event '{id}' is not produced by any behavior
feature '{id}' is not implemented by any behavior
{kind} '{id}' has verify kind '{value}' not in allowed set {allowed}
event '{id}' trigger must reference a behavior, found {kind} '{value}'
type '{id}' has invalid kind '{value}' — expected one of: struct, enum, alias, opaque
